mano_cua.result_summary: 应用需要Supabase配置(VITE_SUPABASE_URL/VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY)，缺失导致React应用挂载失败，停留在启动画面无法进入编辑器界面。命令面板、搜索、右键菜单等核心功能均无法测试。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Based on my thorough testing of the Lokus notes application at http://localhost:1420: Critical Bug - VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY missing, causing Supabase client initialization to fail with 'supabaseUrl is required' error. React app fails to mount, application renders only a splash screen that never resolves. All 5 test items (editor load, command palette, search, file tree context menu, editor context menu) FAIL due to app not loading.
